name: rifft
description: Rifft - cross-framework debugger for multi-agent AI systems

scripts.dev: set -a && [ -f ./.env ] && . ./.env; : "${DATABASE_URL:=postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-rifft}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-rifft}@localhost:${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}/${POSTGRES_DB:-rifft}}"; export DATABASE_URL; : "${CLICKHOUSE_URL:=http://localhost:${CLICKHOUSE_PORT:-8123}}"; export CLICKHOUSE_URL; set +a; pnpm --parallel --filter @rifft/collector --filter @rifft/api --filter @rifft/web dev
